title: Deliciously Crispy Irish Polish Sausage Skillet
description: A romantic Irish dish featuring crispy Polish sausage, soffritto base, and a hint of mustard, made with macrobiotic friendly ingredients.
instructions: Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium high heat.
Add the sliced Polish sausage and cook until browned on both sides, about 5 minutes.
Remove the sausage from the skillet and set aside.
Add the chopped onion, carrot, and celery to the skillet and cook until the vegetables are tender, about 5 minutes.
Add the whole wheat flour to the skillet and cook for 1 minute, stirring constantly.
Stir in the mustard and cook for 1 minute.
Add the cooked sausage back to the skillet and stir to combine with the vegetable mixture.
Season with salt and black pepper to taste.
Cook for an additional 2 minutes, until the sausage is crispy.
